## What and why

What this changes, and the reason for it.

## How tested

Which deploy path you ran and what you watched. For example: a clean
`./deploy.sh` (MinIO, Flink on), the step you ran in the webapp at `:3030`, the
OS / Docker you were on.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read my own diff before opening this PR.
- [ ] Docs updated where needed (README / CLAUDE.md / CONTRIBUTING), or N/A.

Commit prefixes (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`) are nice but not required —
a clear message matters more. See
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
